title: rubus pyramidaliformis
intro: Rubus pyramidaliformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus pyramidaliformis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to prevent cancer and cardiovascular disease. Rubus pyramidaliformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
